scripts.test:ci: npm run build && npm run test:runtime && npm run check:workflow && npm run check:docs && npm run check:shell
scripts.check:shell: bash -n $(find scripts ../.github/actions -name '*.sh' -type f | sort) && node --test dist/__tests__/agent-action-expiration.test.js $(find dist -name '*-shell.test.js' -type f | sort) $(find scripts -path '*/test/*.test.cjs' -type f | sort)
